data.name: Hentai Gymnast Scarlett
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a world of flexibility, allure, and focus. Hentai Gymnast Scarlett is a unique adult puzzle game that blends classic jigsaw mechanics with the aesthetics of hentai art. At its core is Scarlett — a talented gymnast with a graceful figure and a bold gaze, showcasing not only her flexibility but also a deep sensuality.

Each level is a puzzle you must complete to reveal a full illustration. You’re not just playing — you’re "undressing" the scene, step by step unveiling its meaning. The puzzles become a tool through which fantasy comes alive. It’s a silent game where everything is expressed through shape, line, and gaze.

✨ Game Features:

🔥 30 unique levels — each puzzle unlocks a new, seductive scene from the gymnast’s life;

🏅 30 achievements — for those who want to complete the full collection and show off their progress;

🖼️ Gallery — revisit unlocked illustrations anytime.


🎯 Difficulty Levels:

  • Easy — minimal pieces, quick gameplay. For relaxed enjoyment and effortless scene viewing;

  • Medium — moderate difficulty. Requires some attention but remains comfortable to complete;

  • Hard — many small details. For those who love a challenge and want full immersion in the process.


Hentai Gymnast Scarlett is not a game to rush through. Here, every mouse movement is a gesture of touch, each puzzle piece a part of the whole image. It’s a game about appreciation of beauty. About intimacy without cliché. About fantasy gradually turning into art.

data.short_description: This is not just erotica. It’s an intimate encounter with visual art that reveals itself to you gradually — piece by piece.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
